zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wheeler於1490年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾文時，他的父親Sir Thomas Wheeler25歲，母親Joan Jane Buckingham20歲。他與Mary Cooke在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 尼古拉斯 高爾 艾比 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 奧拉福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1546年5月22日在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年56歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wheeler于1490年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾文时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Wheeler25岁，母亲Joan Jane Buckingham20岁。他与Mary Cooke在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 尼古拉斯 高爾 艾比 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 奧拉福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1546年5月22日在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年56岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: Wheeler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a wheelwright, a maker of wheels (primarily for carts and other vehicles, but also other kinds of wheels, for use in spinning or other manufacturing processes), from Middle English wheler, whegheler, a derivative of Old English hweogol, hweowol, hwēol ‘wheel’.
History: A founder of Salisbury, NH, in 1634 was John Wheeler.

variants.name: Rower
meanings: English: occupational name from Anglo-Norman French roer ‘wheelwright’ (Old French roier, rouwier, rouer, an agent derivative of roue ‘wheel’). Compare Wheeler .
English: occupational name from Middle English rouer(e) ‘rower, oarsman’. Compare Rother .

variants.name: Wheelwright
meanings: English (Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English whelewright(e), whelrihte ‘wheelwright, maker of wheels and wheeled vehicles’ (Old English hwēol + wyrhta). See also Wheeler .

History: John Wheelwright (c. 1592–1679), clergyman, came to Boston, MA, from Lincolnshire, England in 1636. He was banished from Massachusettes for his support of his sister-in-law, Anne Hutchinson, in the antinomian controversy; he set up a community at Exeter, NH.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wheeler was born in 1490, in Wing, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Wheeler, was 25 and his mother, Joan Jane Buckingham, was 20. He married Mary Cooke in London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 May 1546, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wheeler est né en 1490, à Wing, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Wheeler, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Jane Buckingham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Mary Cooke à London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1546, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Wheeler 1490 in Wing, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Wheeler 25 und seine Mutter Joan Jane Buckingham 20. Er hat in London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, England Mary Cooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1546 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wheeler è nato il nel 1490 nel Wing, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Wheeler, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Joan Jane Buckingham, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Mary Cooke nel London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 maggio 1546, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wheelerが1490年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウィングで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Wheelerは25歳，母Joan Jane Buckinghamは20歳であった。イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ニチオラス コール アビー ウィス スト ニチオラス オラブでMary Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1546年5月22日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで56歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 닉홀아스 콜 애브브이 위스 스트 닉홀아스 올레이브
ko.lifeSummary: John Wheeler(이)가 1490년 영국 벅잉함실르 윙에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Wheeler(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Jane Buckingham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 닉홀아스 콜 애브브이 위스 스트 닉홀아스 올레이브에서 Mary Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1546년 5월 22일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wheeler nasceu em 1490, em Wing, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Wheeler, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Jane Buckingham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Cooke em London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1546, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Ni: лондон ст ничолас кол эбби вит ст ничолас олав, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wheeler родился в 1490 г. в местности виг, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Wheeler было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Jane Buckingham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Cooke в местности лондон ст ничолас кол эбби вит ст ничолас олав, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 мая 1546 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия.

Se casó con Mary Cooke en London St Nicholas Cole Abbey with St Nicholas Olave, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1546, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
